description: Standing gating LLM-judgment leaf: judges whether a visitor who understands the Common Sense Majority movement can choose and complete a concrete next action (sign a statement, fund civic content, or follow another CSM-aligned workflow).

targetWorkflow.goal: Having arrived via Common Sense Majority and understood the movement, a visitor can find and complete one concrete next action: sign a relevant statement on Tally, or fund civic content via a content-funding portal, without dead-ending or guessing.
